---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest something to add or improve
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like?

<!-- Describe the feature or improvement clearly. -->

## Why does it matter?

<!-- What problem does this solve? What's painful about the current experience? -->

## What phase or skill would this affect?

<!-- e.g. Phase 5 (journal setup), the CRM template, SKILL.md in general, etc. -->

## Do you have a specific idea for how it should work?

<!-- Optional — share your thinking if you have one. -->

## Are you willing to contribute a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I can implement this
- [ ] Yes, with some guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting
